title: TGT vs. ROST: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?

title: Customers Love this Low-Price Retailer, But Is the Stock a Buy?
text: Ross Stores' same-store sales rose a pleasing 5% in the third quarter of 2023. The strong same-store sales growth was largely driven by an increase in traffic.
